name: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation
summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corporation, commonly known as Wabtec, is a global provider of equipment, systems, digital solutions, and services to the rail and transit industries. The company operates through two main segments: Transit and Freight. Wabtec's products include advanced braking systems, power generation and distribution systems, and digital monitoring and control solutions, serving a wide range of customers worldwide.
